properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 62/25
 1. M/V RAMFORM TETHYS IS CONDUCTING SEISMIC SURVEY OPERATIONS FROM 04 OF JUNE 2025  TOWING 14 SEISMIC CABLES LENGTH 6.5NM AND 1NM WIDTH
 IN AREA BOUNDED BY:
 A. 70-41.90N 021-03.50E
 B. 71-16.30N 024-01.40E
 C. 71-54.50N 024-53.60E
 D. 71-54.90N 022-50.60E

 2. WIDE BERTH REQUESTED, MINIMUM 3NM AHEAD AND ON BOTH SIDES, 9NM ASTERN.
 SUPPORT VESSELS THOR FREYJA AND LINDE-G IN ATTENDANCE.
 VHF WORKING CHANNELS 88 AND 16.
  
 3.END OF SEISMIC SURVEY: UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE.
